fields.helpText: This is the unique identifier for this administration record. It is the  IEN.
Pointer to the NAME field (#.01) of the PATIENT file (#2). This specifies the patient attached to this specific administration.
A pointer to NAME field (#.01) of the MH TESTS AND SURVEYS file (#601.71), it specifies a particular instrument.
This is the date the patient started the instrument.
Date last edited, ie last time test was worked on for this administration.
User who ordered the test.
Clerk who actually entered the information or started the patient in  front of the computer.
Has administration been signed by the orderer or administrator.
Boolean specifying if test is complete.
The number of answers entered. If less than in MH Instrument CONTENT for  this instrument, it is incomplete.
Place for orderer or administrator to make free text comments.

fields.setOfCodes: S:Successfully added to db;T:Transmitted, not yet added;E:Error;
fields.helpText: Used to indicate success or failure in transmission to the Mental Health National DataBase.
Time of last transmission status.
Associates an administration to a Hospital Location. Pointer to the NAME  field (#.01) of the HOPSITAL LOCATION file (#44).

This field contains the revision level of the scoring fields/routines when the administration was last scored.  This is used to indicate if the instrument needs to be re-scored due to updates/fixes to scoring for the instrument.

This provides information about which mechanism was used to create the  administration.  Applications may add new mechanisms as they are  detected.  For example, entry sources might be 'ipad' or 'kiosk'.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:NONE;1:POSITIVE RESPONSE;2:HIGH RISK;3:BOTH HIGH RISK & POSITIVE RESPONSE;9:EXPIRED;
fields.helpText: Suicide Risk for this instrument administration. 0 or blank is no risk, 1  is a Positive Response, 2 is High Risk, and 3 is both High Risk and  Positive Response.
This field contains a consult number from the Request/Consultation file  (#123).  It is used to find the progress note associated with the consult.
This is the current user at the time the administration record is saved.
This field is set to YES if a clinician has reviewed the administration.
This field is set to YES if a progress note has been generated for this  administration.
